### Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.4.20 contains a hook session-key bypass vulnerability that allows attackers to circumvent the hooks.allowRequestSessionKey opt-in restriction. Attackers can render externally influenced session keys through templated hook mappings to bypass webhook routing isolation controls.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9j32-3m66-mc4m", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-18T15:29:27Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9j32-3m66-mc4m", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9j32-3m66-mc4m"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-11T18:16:40Z", "published_at": "2026-05-11T18:31:47Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-2xcp-x87w-q377", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45002", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/5275d008ed33203dba3f98e969ad683a65c416c3", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-hook-session-key-bypass-via-template-mapping", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9j32-3m66-mc4m"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: OpenClaw: Hook mapping templates could bypass hook session-key opt-in", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-18T15:29:29Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-9j32-3m66-mc4m", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.20", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.20"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-05-18T15:29:27Z"}
